Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by zoom for petitioner.

Mr. Brelser stated that he went through the encouragement that he received by the court and that he revised the numbers to match the court. The First Amended First and Final Report of Administrator on Waiver of Account, etc. is continued to June 10, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Petition To Determine Succession T Personal Property
Off Calendar Nov-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler, via Zoom, for Charles S.W. Leung, Personal Representative.

The court queries Mr. Bresler regarding Mr. Tong's varying signatures on documents filed with the court. Mr. Bresler reports that the signed stipulation filed on Nov-07-2022 was emailed to him directly from Mr. Tang and that he has no explanation to provide regarding the varying signatures except that they are many years apart.

The court takes the matter under submission with the intent to grant as prayed.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Petition To Determine Succession T Personal Property
Off Calendar Oct-17-2022 Continued To Nov-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler, via Zoom, for Charles S.W. Leung, Personal Representative.

Mr. Bresler reports of service to Hon Tang via the Hong Kong Court and that Hon signed an acknowledgment of receipt. The court waives service in open court. The court confirms with Mr. Bresler that he believes that he can proceed without an order from this court's Family Law Department.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Nov-14-2022. Mr. Bresler is advised to provide Hon Tang with proper notice regarding the next hearing.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-22-2022 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Succession T Personal Property
Off Calendar Aug-22-2022 Continued To Oct-17-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler, via Zoom, for Charles S.W. Leung, Petitioner.

Mr. Bresler reports of being advised through a translator that Hon Tang is aware of the papers that were sent to the Hong Kong Court for service as authorized under the Hague Convention and that Mr. Tang is considering hiring counsel for advice regarding the acknowledgment of receipt.

The matter is continued to Oct-17-2022 at 9:00 in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-06-2022 Continued To Aug-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Succession T Personal Property
Off Calendar Jun-20-2022 Continued To Aug-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler, via Zoom, for Charles S.W. Leung, Petitioner.

Mr. Bresler reports that papers have been sent to the Hong Kong High Court for service of process but has not received a reply and no acknowledgment of service. Mr. Bresler reports that he has not lost faith that Hon Tang will participate. The court suggests that Mr. Bresler consider the option of a post judgment motion under Family Code 2556.

The matter is continued to Aug-22-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Petition To Determine Succession T Personal Property
Off Calendar Apr-18-2022 Continued To Jun-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler, via Zoom, for Charles Leung, Petitioner.

The court queries counsel regarding the chances of Hon signing and returning an acknowledgment. Counsel offers testimony regarding service to Hon as allowed by the Hague Service Convention. Counsel offers additional information as to the status of this matter and points to a Notice of Hearing filed Feb-14-2022 which includes an apostille regarding service to Hon. The court advises counsel that it does not appear that Hon has been properly served with notice of this proceeding and will continue the matter to allow for additional attempts to properly serve Hon.

The Petition to Determine Succession to Real Property is continued to Jun-20-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.
